seo.title: Lawyer in Lahore Cantt | MEO, Cantonment & Property — Saeed Law Firm
seo.description: Lahore Cantt lawyer for MEO disputes, Cantonment Board property matters, byelaws challenges, and Cantt-resident family/corporate cases.

hero.intro: Lahore Cantt lawyer for MEO disputes, Cantonment Board property matters, byelaws challenges, and Cantt-resident family/corporate cases.

bodyMarkdown:
Lahore Cantt sits on a separate procedural track from urban Lahore. Properties are administered under the Cantonments Act 1924, with parallel Military Estates Office (MEO) jurisdiction over A-1 (defence) land. House tax, property tax, building byelaws, and certain civil disputes fall within Cantonment Board jurisdiction rather than ordinary urban administration. A **lawyer in Lahore Cantt** must therefore work fluently across two layers — the Cantonment-specific framework and general Pakistani civil law — without that fluency, Cantt matters become protracted unnecessarily. **Saeed Law Firm** has served Lahore Cantt residents since 1975, with practice across Saddar Bazaar, Cavalry Ground, Askari, Walton, and adjacent zones. Our office at 13 Fane Road is a 20-minute drive from most Cantt addresses.

### Lahore Cantt-Specific Matters We Handle

**MEO disputes.** Lease renewals on A-1 land, allotment cancellations, conversion of land use, mutation of leasehold rights between heirs, and recovery actions by MEO. See our [Cantonment Court page](/courts/cantonment-court-lawyer-lahore) for the court-side dimension.

**Cantonment property mutation.** Distinct from urban Lahore mutation — handled through Cantonment Board records and procedure under the Cantonments Act 1924.

**Building byelaws.** Cantonment Board approvals, deviation notices, sealing notices, and demolition challenges.

**House tax and property tax challenges.** Assessment revisions, recovery defence, and arrears matters under the Cantonments Act 1924 framework.

**Trade licence disputes.** Saddar Bazaar and Cantt commercial strips have their own trade-licence regime under the Cantonment Board.

**Family and matrimonial matters.** Standard family-law work for Cantt-resident families. See our [family lawyer in Lahore](/family-lawyer-in-lahore) page.

**Civil and corporate matters.** General civil suits and corporate work for Cantt-based businesses and residents — handled across Civil Courts and the Lahore High Court depending on forum.

### Lahore Cantt Areas We Serve

- Saddar Bazaar
- Cavalry Ground
- Askari I, IX, X and other Askari schemes
- Walton (airfield-area residential)
- DHA-Cantt boundary zones
- Sarwar Road and Tufail Road residential strips
- Airport Road commercial strip

### Where Lahore Cantt Matters Are Heard

- **Cantonment Board Lahore** — internal grievance for byelaws, tax, and trade licence
- **MEO Lahore** — for A-1 land and lease matters
- **Cantonment Court Lahore** — within its scheduled jurisdiction
- **Civil Courts Lahore** at Aiwan-e-Adal — for general civil suits not within exclusive Cantonment jurisdiction
- **Lahore High Court** — writ jurisdiction over Cantonment Board and MEO actions ([court page →](/courts/lawyer-at-lahore-high-court))

### Travel and Consultation

Office to Saddar Bazaar: ~15 minutes by car. To DHA-Cantt boundary: ~25 minutes. To Walton: ~25–30 minutes. Zoom and WhatsApp consultations available.

### Why Saeed Law Firm for Lahore Cantt

- 50 years' practice including cantonment matters; familiarity with the Cantonments Act 1924 framework
- Coordinated practice across Cantonment Court, Civil Court, and Lahore High Court for matters that require multi-forum strategy
- Multi-practice capability — property, family, corporate, tax — useful given the affluent professional and military resident base

### Frequently Asked Questions

**Can I challenge a house tax assessment by Lahore Cantonment Board?**
Yes — through internal representation and, if unresolved, through judicial channels including LHC writ jurisdiction.

**Can MEO cancel my A-1 land lease?**
MEO can cancel allotments on grounds specified in the lease and rules — typically misuse, breach, or non-payment. Cancellation is challengeable at Cantonment Court or LHC.

**Where do I challenge a Cantonment Board sealing notice?**
Internal Cantonment Board representation first, then judicial review at appropriate forum based on the specific action.

**Do Civil Courts have jurisdiction over Cantonment property?**
For general civil disputes not within the Cantonment Court's exclusive jurisdiction, Civil Courts Lahore are competent. The boundary between forums depends on the specific cause of action.

**How much does a lawyer in Lahore Cantt charge?**
Standard firm rates — initial consultation PKR 5,000–10,000, fixed-fee for routine matters, stage-based for litigation.

details.label: Travel From Our Office
values: ~20 minutes by car from Fane Road

faqs.q: How do I book a consultation with Saeed Law Firm?
faqs.a: Use the contact form on this site, call our Fane Road office, or WhatsApp us. We respond within one business day and schedule a same-week appointment for most matters.

faqs.q: Do you serve clients outside Lahore?
faqs.a: Yes. We represent clients across Pakistan and overseas Pakistanis, with primary court appearances in Lahore. Remote consultations are available via Zoom and WhatsApp.
